form These are the forms which you see on contact pages, google forms or enquiry forms The details of the flight or railway ticket, date and time, where to go and where to go are submitted through the HTML forms In the last video, very few people liked it I will request you to like this video with high energy so that we can maintain high energy throughout the course So let's go to the computer screen and see the forms, input tags and some best practices Let's roll the intro So guys, I have come to my computer screen and now see I am going to make a folder here which I am going to name it I will do view word wrap, screen cast mode and I will write forms here let's learn it so I have set the title of this forms page and by setting the title, we can see the actual title on our page simply write live preview and we can actually set it so that whenever we click on it, it will open on the external browser so now I will close everything and as soon as I click on it, it will open on click on it, it will open so if you want to do this, then do it but sometimes you will want to do side by side view and when you want to do that, you can do it by using HTML, CSS and working on design
